---
title: "Publications"
pagetitle: "Publications — Arvind Karunakaran"
description: "Peer-reviewed articles and book chapters by Arvind Karunakaran."
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: papers.yml
    template: _templates/publications.ejs
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 200
---

Full list below, newest first. &ldquo;**Equal Contribution**&rdquo; denotes
equal authorship. DOI links resolve to the publisher of record; a **PDF**
button appears where a copy is hosted here.

<nav class="pub-filter" aria-label="Filter publications by type">
  <button class="pub-filter-btn active" data-filter="all" aria-pressed="true">All</button>
  <button class="pub-filter-btn" data-filter="journal" aria-pressed="false">Journal Articles</button>
  <button class="pub-filter-btn" data-filter="chapter" aria-pressed="false">Book Chapters</button>
  <button class="pub-filter-btn" data-filter="working" aria-pressed="false">Working Papers</button>
</nav>

:::{#publications}
:::

<script>
// Lightweight, dependency-free type filter over the year-grouped list.
(function () {
  const btns = document.querySelectorAll('.pub-filter-btn');
  const scope = document.getElementById('publications');
  if (!scope) return;
  const items = Array.prototype.slice.call(scope.querySelectorAll('.pub-item'));
  const heads = Array.prototype.slice.call(scope.querySelectorAll('.pub-year'));
  function yearClass(el) {
    return (el.className.match(/\by\d{4}\b/) || [null])[0];
  }
  function apply(filter) {
    items.forEach(function (el) {
      const match = filter === 'all' || el.classList.contains('type-' + filter);
      el.style.display = match ? '' : 'none';
    });
    // Hide a year header when no visible item shares its year.
    heads.forEach(function (h) {
      const yc = yearClass(h);
      const anyVisible = items.some(function (el) {
        return el.classList.contains(yc) && el.style.display !== 'none';
      });
      h.style.display = anyVisible ? '' : 'none';
    });
  }
  btns.forEach(function (b) {
    b.addEventListener('click', function () {
      btns.forEach(function (x) { x.classList.remove('active'); x.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'false'); });
      b.classList.add('active');
      b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', 'true');
      apply(b.getAttribute('data-filter'));
    });
  });
})();
</script>
